class.name: JustAMCPPromptBlaziumContext
class.brief_description: Provides a built-in prompt with Blazium and Godot engine context.
class.description: A [JustAMCPPrompt] implementation that returns version, module, and engine-environment context for MCP clients. Use it for a lightweight server status check. For substantial work, prefer [code]blazium_project_intake[/code], which embeds richer project, scene, selection, and guide resources.
